info.title: GitReleaseManager
info.description:
Copyright (c) 2015 - Present - GitTools Contributors
create        Creates a draft release notes from a milestone.
discard       Discards a draft release.
addasset      Adds an asset to an existing release.
close         Closes the milestone.
open          Opens the milestone.
publish       Publishes the Release.
export        Exports all the Release Notes in markdown format.
init          Creates a sample Yaml Configuration file in root directory
showconfig    Shows the current configuration
label         Deletes existing labels and replaces with set of default labels.
help          Display more information on a specific command.
version       Display version information.

commands.name: create
commands.description: Creates a draft release notes from a milestone.

options.name: --assets
options.description: Paths to the files to include in the release.

options.name: --targetcommitish
options.description:
The commit to tag. Can be a branch or SHA. Defaults
to repository's default branch.

options.name: --milestone
options.description:
The milestone to use. (Can't be used together with a
release notes file path).

options.name: --name
options.description:
The name of the release (Typically this is the
generated SemVer Version Number).

options.name: --inputFilePath
options.description:
The path to the file to be used as the content of the
release notes. (Can't be used together with a
milestone)

options.name: --template
options.description:
The name of the template file to use. Can also be a
relative or absolute path (relative paths are
resolved from yaml template-dir configuration).
Defaults to 'default'

options.name: --pre
options.description: Creates the release as a pre-release.

options.name: --allowEmpty
options.description:
Allow the creation of an empty set of release notes.
In this mode, milestone and input file path will be
ignored.

options.name: --token
options.description:
Required. The Access Token to access Version Control
System with.

options.name: --owner
options.description: Required. The owner of the repository.

options.name: --repository
options.description: Required. The name of the repository.

options.name: --provider
options.description: (Default: GitHub) Version Control System provider

options.name: --debug
options.description: Enable debugging console output

options.name: --logFilePath
options.description:
Path to where log file should be created. Defaults to
logging to console.

options.name: --no-logo
options.description: Disables the generation of the GRM commandline logo.

options.name: --targetDirectory
options.description:
The directory on which GitReleaseManager should be
executed. Defaults to current directory.

options.name: --verbose
options.description: Enable verbose console output

options.name: --ci
options.description:
Configure GitReleaseManager to be compatible with CI
systems

options.name: --help
options.description: Display this help screen.

options.name: --version
options.description: Display version information.

options.description: Required. The milestone to use.

commands.name: export
commands.description: Exports all the Release Notes in markdown format.

options.name: --fileOutputPath
options.description: Required. Path to the file export releases.

options.name: --tagName
options.description:
The name of the release (Typically this is the
generated SemVer Version Number).

options.name: --skipPrereleases
options.description:
Should pre-release releases be ignored when
generating release notes? Defaults to false.

options.description:
